nameMeanings.name: Fisher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a fisherman, from Middle English fis(sc)her(e) ‘fisherman’ (Old English fiscere). In North America, this surname has absorbed cognates from many other languages, including German Fischer and its Slavic(ized) variant Fišer (see Fiser ), Dutch Visser , Hungarian Halász (see Halasz ), Italian Pescatore , Slovenian Ribič (see Ribic ), and Croatian Ribić or Ribar .

English: in a few cases, possibly a topographic name for someone who lived near a fish weir on a river, from Middle English fis(sc)hwere, fisshyar ‘fish weir’ (Old English fiscwer, fiscgear), or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Fisher in North Mundham, Sussex.
Irish: translation into English of Gaelic Ó Bradáin ‘descendant of Bradán’, a personal name meaning ‘salmon’. See Braden .

variants.name: Fischer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Erwin, Gerhard, Helmut, Fritz, Klaus, Horst, Dieter, Franz, Ernst.

German, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a fisherman, from Middle High German visch, German Fisch ‘fish’ + the agent suffix -er. This form of the surname is also established in some other parts of Europe, notably in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, and the Netherlands. In Poland, Czechia, Croatia, and Slovenia it is (also) established in the Slavicized forms Fiszer (Polish) and Fišer (see Fiser ). Compare Fisher .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Fisher was born on 1 September 1434, in Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Lord Robert Lee Fisher I, was 25 and his mother, Leticia Joan Corbin, was 19. He had at least 1 son with Agnes. He died in 1470, in Beverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Fisher est né le 1 septembre 1434, à Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Lord Robert Lee Fisher I, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Leticia Joan Corbin, avait 19 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Agnes. Il est décédé en 1470, à Beverley, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Fisher am 1. September 1434 in Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Robert Lee Fisher I 25 und seine Mutter Leticia Joan Corbin 19. Er hatte mit Agnes mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1470 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Beverley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Fisher è nato il il 1 settembre 1434 nel Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Lord Robert Lee Fisher I, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Leticia Joan Corbin, aveva 19 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Agnes. Morì nel 1470, nel Beverley, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 36 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Fisher(이)가 1434년 9월 1일 영국 링코실르 하그나비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Robert Lee Fisher I(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Leticia Joan Corbin(은)는 19세였다. 그는 Agnes(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1470년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 베벌리에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Fisher nasceu em 1 de setembro de 1434, em Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Lord Robert Lee Fisher I, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Leticia Joan Corbin, tinha 19 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Agnes. Ele faleceu em 1470, em Beverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Fisher родился 1 сентября 1434 г. в местности хагнаби, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord Robert Lee Fisher I было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Leticia Joan Corbin, 19. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Agnes. Он умер в 1470 г. в местности бивирли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Fisher nació el 1 de septiembre de 1434, en Hagnaby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Lord Robert Lee Fisher I, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Leticia Joan Corbin, tenía 19 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Agnes. Murió en 1470, en Beverley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 36 años.
